user_goal: 按 MVP PRD 在 Global ETF Momentum 与 B009 数据 snapshot 基础上实现 Risk Parity / Volatility Target 回测 MVP：新增最小 risk parity 配置、收益率/波动率估计、逆波动率权重、无杠杆 exposure scaling、月度 T-day/T+1 回测 workflow、报告与安全回归，同时保持 fixture/mock-first CI、snapshot/data-quality semantics 和 no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI safety guards。

evaluator_feedback.summary: B010 Risk Parity Backtest MVP passed local/CI-safe L1 verification. Required checks passed, risk parity reports preserve research limitations and snapshot/data-quality semantics, and safety guards remain intact.

generator_handoff: Generator completed B010 F001-F006. F006 added tests/unit/test_risk_parity_safety_guards.py with regression coverage proving the risk parity path is fixture/mock-first by default and does not introduce network/credential/broker/AI/public-import/frontend dependencies, that risk parity reports never claim paper or live execution, that the backtest does not perform socket I/O or modify trade/data/fixtures/, that default parameters carry no broker/live language, that leveraged max_exposure values fail validation, and that the public-import stub is never auto-invoked. Local checks pass: pytest (100 tests), ruff, compileall, mypy. Evaluator should run F007 L1 verification, inspect the new risk parity safety regression suite, and confirm B010 satisfies all B001-B009 safety guards.
